name: Black Forest Pudding Cake
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup Kirsch or 2 tablespoons water plus
1/2 teaspoon almond extract or rum extract
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. In a medium-size bowl, combine 3/4 cup of the sugar, flour, 3 tablespoons of cocoa, baking powder, and salt. Blend in milk (or water), melted butter, and vanilla; beat until smooth. Spread into an 8-inch square pan.
3. In a small bowl, combine remaining 1/2 cup of sugar, packed brown sugar, and remaining 1 tablespoon of cocoa. Sprinkle mixture evenly over batter.
4. Combine hot water and Kirsch (or water plus extract). Pour over batter without stirring.
5. Bake for 40 minutes, or until center is almost set. Let stand 15 minutes.
6. Transfer to dessert dishes and spoon pudding from the bottom of the pan over cake.
7. Serve with cherry pie filling as sauce. (Great without the cherry pie filling, and/or with whipped cream.)
